definition:
1. to light up, kindle , πυρσεύσας σέλας Εὐβοίαν having lit up  Euboea with beacon-fires  σέλας combining with the notion of the Verb), (Euripides) 
2. to make signals by torches  or beacon-fires , (Xenophon Historicus): metaphorically, πυρσεύετε κραυγὴν ἀγῶνος give  a shout in signal  of battle, (Euripides):—;Pass., δόξα ὥσπερ ἀπὸ σκοπῆς πυρσεύεται (Plutarch): impersonal, πυρσεύεται fire-signals are made , (Lucian) (ML)
